caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a navy blue t-shirt and a headset, is featured in a small video overlay in the lower left of a larger screen. He is gesturing with his hands and speaking with an open mouth. The main background consists of a stylized, yellowish-green scene with a large pumpkin in the upper right and various orange pumpkins along the bottom. In the center is a red, banner-like graphic containing a large, stylized white symbol. To the left and right of this graphic are rows of horizontal white bars. The text "HARVEST PRESENT" appears in the top left corner of the screen. Smaller text at the bottom of the main display reads "WAKU WAKU MARK," "PROMBs ALL," and "BACK." In the top right, there is a status bar showing "LV 19" and "(90)." The man's expression and hand gestures change slightly as he reacts to the content on the screen.
